mcp_server.name: OP_WHSEPHYSICALINVENTORYDOC_0001
mcp_server.description: SAP EWM Warehouse Physical Inventory Document API (A2X). Supports creating physical inventory documents, reading document headers and items with counted/booked quantities, and posting stock differences. Full CRUD for EWM physical inventory lifecycle.
mcp_server.note: Customer-deployed on-premise MCP server. Tool schemas must be validated against the deployed instance. Tools below are derived from the OP_WHSEPHYSICALINVENTORYDOC_0001 OData/A2X service structure.

tools.name: list_WarehousePhysicalInventoryDoc
tools.title: List Physical Inventory Documents
tools.description: Reads EWM physical inventory document headers. Filterable by warehouse number, document status, and fiscal year. Returns document number, warehouse, status (open/counted/posted), creation date, and related product/storage location. Use $filter for status filtering (e.g. status eq 'COUNTED'). Use $top max 100.

$filter.description: OData filter, e.g. "WarehouseNumber eq '0001' and InventoryDocumentStatus eq 'COUNTED'"

$expand.description: Expand to include document items, e.g. 'to_PhysicalInventoryDocItem'

tools.name: get_WarehousePhysicalInventoryDocItem
tools.title: Get Physical Inventory Document Items
tools.description: Reads individual line items of a physical inventory document. Returns product, storage bin, book quantity (BookQuantity), counted quantity (CountedQuantity), unit of measure, and difference quantity. Used to compare counted vs. booked stock.

tools.name: create_WarehousePhysicalInventoryDoc
tools.title: Create Physical Inventory Document
tools.description: Creates a new EWM physical inventory document for a product in a warehouse. Requires warehouse number, product, and storage details. Returns the created document number and fiscal year. WRITE operation — must only be called after explicit user confirmation.

tools.name: post_PhysicalInventoryDifference
tools.title: Post Physical Inventory Difference
tools.description: Posts the stock difference for a physical inventory document item, adjusting booked stock to match counted quantity. WRITE/HIGH-RISK operation — must only be called after explicit user confirmation with line-level exclusion review. Irreversible.

Items.description: Document items to post (excluded items must be omitted from this array)
